issues.sample: ONE NIGHT SHORTLY AFTER I PICKED UP MY 2020 GENESIS G90, I WAS DRIVING HOME ON A CITY STREET WHEN I NOTICED SOMETHING WRONG WITH MY HEADLIGHTS.  AS I WAS DRIVING I WAS TRYING TO FIGURE OUT WHAT WAS WRONG WITH THEM.  I KEPT THINKING THAT THERE WAS AN OBSTRUCTION ON THE HEADLIGHTS

THE CONTINENTAL CONTRIPROCONTACT TIRES ON MY 2020 GENESIS G90 HAVE A CONSTANT VIBRATION.  IT FEELS LIKE YOU ARE DRIVING OVER RUMBLE STRIPS. ON 2/12/2020 (1 WEEK AFTER PURCHASE), CALLED THE DEALER TO REPORT THE PROBLEM.  THE DEALER SAID THEY TALKED TO GENESIS AND GENESIS SAID THEY

narrative.headline: What 2020 Genesis G90 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 2 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Exterior Lighting (50% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
